headline: IDEXX Laboratories Inc (NASDAQ:IDXX) Passes Caviar Cruise Quality Screen With Strong Fundamentals
summary: Quality investing screen reveals IDEXX Laboratories as a top candidate, boasting 57% ROIC, 14% EBIT growth, and low debt, meeting strict Caviar Cruise criteria.
